<!-- One sentence: what do you want, and why -->

---

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- Describe the problem this feature solves. Who is affected and how often?

---

<!-- Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

---

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered other ways to solve this problem? Why is this approach better? -->

---
